title: No Mob Latency
description: This mod re-adds the pre-1.3 smooth mob movement to singleplayer, without any latency. Also reintroduces client-side mob movement.
body:
This mod re-adds the pre-1.3 smooth mob movement to singleplayer, without any latency. Also reintroduces client-side mob movement.

A video that I have posted on YouTube explains this problem here: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ciswW7Vcgk0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod changes the default mob tickrate from 3 to 1, and reimplements shared mob movement from both the client and server which was initially removed in 1.8. It can have glitches, though.

Known bugs:
- Horses will continue to move clientside after riding.
- Happy Ghasts cannot be controlled.
